hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.fantrax-cache/*|*/.cache/*) echo 'BLOCKED: refusing to edit sensitive/cache file' >&2; exit 1;; *) exit 0;; esac
hooks.description: Block edits to credential and cache files
